title: IOCL Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Specialist/ Superspecialist Doctor Posts
description: The Indian Oil Corporation Limited (Indian Oil Corporation) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Specialist/ Superspecialist Doctor Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, Post-graduation, Diploma, MD/MS, and DNB can apply for the IOCL Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
